## Current Audit Snapshot

Every checked replication source should now be traceable through the canonical audit files listed below. In practice, `cataloged` means the source shows up in the non-lossy evidence inventory, the canonical source-family audit, the build-known source catalog, or the unresolved worklist as appropriate.

- Canonical source-family audit rows: `107` in [replication_source_audit.csv](../data/derived/replication_pairs/replication_source_audit.csv)
- Non-lossy evidence-surface rows: `346` in [replication_source_evidence_inventory.csv](../data/derived/replication_pairs/replication_source_evidence_inventory.csv)
- Source datasets known to the current build: `103` in [replication_pair_source_catalog.csv](../data/derived/replication_pairs/replication_pair_source_catalog.csv)
- Prioritized unresolved checked sources: `10` in [replication_source_worklist.csv](../data/derived/replication_pairs/replication_source_worklist.csv)
- Live integrated pair rows: `2,430` in [replication_pairs_all_on_hand.csv](../data/derived/replication_pairs/replication_pairs_all_on_hand.csv)
- Figure 2 rule-qualified rows: `1,684` in [replication_pairs_figure2_rule_subset.csv](../data/derived/replication_pairs/replication_pairs_figure2_rule_subset.csv)
- Audit rows with integrated live data: `70`
- Audit rows with staged artifacts: `54`
- Audit rows with promoted artifacts: `26`
- Audit rows with raw directories present: `53`
- Audit rows flagged for manual backfill: `26`
- Legacy Appendix D target coverage: `527` / `555` rows, leaving a gap of `28`

### Canonical audit status counts

::: {.dataset-table .compact-count-table}

| Audit status | Source families |
| --- | --- |
| integrated_live | 68 |
| staged_only | 24 |
| catalog_not_integrated | 12 |
| catalog_integrated | 2 |
| raw_artifact_only | 1 |

:::

### Legacy Appendix D family coverage

::: {.dataset-table .compact-count-table}

| Appendix family | Target rows | Covered rows | Remaining gap |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Registered Replication Reports | 9 | 0 | 9 |
| Other direct replications | 3 | 0 | 3 |
| Many Labs 1 | 13 | 10 | 3 |
| Many Labs 2 | 28 | 28 | 0 |
| Many Labs 3 | 8 | 8 | 0 |
| Many Labs 4 | 1 | 0 | 1 |
| Many Labs 5 | 6 | 6 | 0 |
| SSRP | 20 | 20 | 0 |
| EERP | 18 | 18 | 0 |
| RPP / OSC 2015 | 98 | 98 | 0 |
| RP:CB | 24 | 24 | 0 |
| SCORE | 282 | 282 | 0 |
| Experimental philosophy / x-phi | 33 | 33 | 0 |
| Pipeline Project | 10 | 0 | 10 |
| DellaVigna-Linos 2022 | 1 | 0 | 1 |
| Marek 2022 BWAS | 1 | 0 | 1 |

:::

### Highest-priority unresolved checked sources

::: {.dataset-table .worklist-table}

| Source | Recommended next step | Priority |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Marcus Four Lab Replication Hcmv7 | stage_downloaded_payload | 90 |
| Ying 2023 pilot-full-scale trials | complete_partial_manual_reconstruction | 85 |
| Border 2019 candidate gene replication | consider_native_metric_lane | 70 |
| EGAP Metaketa I | consider_native_metric_lane | 70 |
| ERN Pe RRR OpenNeuro | consider_native_metric_lane | 70 |
| Mullinix Leeper Druckman Freese 2015 | consider_native_metric_lane | 70 |
| Wood and Porter elusive backfire effect | consider_native_metric_lane | 70 |
| ManyBabies 3 | locate_machine_readable_payload | 55 |
| Self control neuroimaging replication | locate_machine_readable_payload | 55 |
| Media priming direct replication | resolve_access_block | 45 |

:::
